testcase.name: test_cognition_platform_audit_has_serving_map
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration146_cognition_platform.py:225: in test_cognition_platform_audit_has_serving_map assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_unified_operations_has_data_contract

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', ConnectionResetError(104, 'Connection reset by peer'))
